common.draftBanner: Vertaling in voorbereiding — Engelstalige inhoud weergegeven.

home.heroTitle: A library of 9 specialised AML/CFT agents — auditable, primary-sourced, reviewer-ready.
home.heroSubtitle: Compress hours of manual KYC/KYB work into structured evidence a compliance officer can sign off on.

sources.title: Primary sources only
sources.body: Official registries, regulator communications, sanctions lists, judicial publications, and tier-1 press citing official sources. Never social media, blogs or forums.

scoring.title: Consistent scoring
scoring.body: Quantitative thresholds, dominant-signal logic, mitigants applied before floors, floors before caps. Two analysts on the same review get the same risk grade.

trail.title: Full citation trail
trail.body: Every material statement is cited — source name, direct page link, and the date the source was published. Reproducible line by line.

human.title: Human-in-the-loop
human.body: Decision support for a compliance reviewer, never an automated compliance verdict. The reviewer always signs off.

home.agentsPreviewSubtitle: Run any agent on demand for a single counterparty, or chain several together for a high-risk file.
home.methodologyBody: Every agent applies the same admissible-source rules. Official registries and regulator or judicial communications are treated as authoritative. Press is admissible only when it corroborates an official source. Aggregators are admissible only when cross-referenced with a primary source. Findings from different agents combine into a single risk file on the same entity, scored on the same scale.

agents.gallerySubtitle: Each agent applies the same source discipline and qualification scale, but covers a different risk surface.

agentPage.sampleOutputBody: A real envelope from a previous run, rendered through the same viewer used in the playground.
agentPage.sampleOutputMissing: Sample output coming soon for this agent.
agentPage.tryCta: Run this agent in the playground

playground.title: Playground
playground.subtitle: Pick an agent, fill the form, run a real query against the local API.
playground.runningHint: Diepgaand onderzoek kan 30 s tot 2 min duren.
playground.noResultYet: Run the agent to see results here.
playground.rawOnlyTitle: Model gaf tekst terug, geen JSON
playground.rawOnlyDetail: Het model produceerde uitvoer die niet als canonieke envelope kon worden geparseerd. De ruwe tekst staat hieronder — probeer opnieuw of verfijn de prompt als dit vaker gebeurt.

form.additionalContextPlaceholder: Anything else the agent should know…

result.metaCostHint: Gebaseerd op gerapporteerd tokenverbruik en gepubliceerde tarieven — uitsluitend ter informatie.
